char.name: Dinah
char.bio: Daughter of Leah and Jacob. I went out to see the women of the land, and everything changed. 💔

friends.name: Leah
friends.bio: Eldest daughter of Laban, the one Jacob did not choose. But the LORD has seen me, and He fills my arms with sons. 💧

friends.name: Jacob
friends.bio: Younger twin with a strong grip, they call me the heel-grabber. Saw a ladder to heaven once. Still chasing the blessing. 🪜

friends.name: Judah
friends.bio: Fourth son of Leah, and this time, I will praise the LORD. Learning my way, for better and for worse. 🦁

friends.name: Simeon
friends.bio: Second son of Leah. Quick to draw the sword when my sister's honor is on the line.

friends.name: Tamar
friends.bio: Widow of Judah's house, wronged and made to wait. I will secure my rightful place in this family, one way or another.

friends.name: Abram
friends.bio: Called to leave my country and my father's house. God promised to make me a great nation.

friends.name: Sarai
friends.bio: Wife of Abram. Following my husband into the unknown. Barren, but keeping faith.

friends.name: Lot
friends.bio: Son of Haran, traveling with my uncle Abram. Looking for well-watered land for my flocks.

friends.name: Isaac
friends.bio: Child of the promise, laughter is in my very name. Walking the land my father was given and trusting the God who provides. 🐑

friends.name: Rebekah
friends.bio: Drew water for a stranger and all his camels, and it changed my whole life. Veiled and on the road to meet my husband. ✨

friends.name: Rachel
friends.bio: Shepherdess of Haran. Jacob worked seven years for me, and to him they seemed but a few days for the love he had. 💍

friends.name: Joseph
friends.bio: Son of Rachel, the dreamer of the family. Had the strangest dream last night about sheaves and stars... ✨

posts.author: CHAR_186
posts.body: I went out to visit the young women of the land, and Shechem, the prince of that place, saw me, and took me, and forced himself on me. I am not going to dress it up in soft words. He violated me. And then, having done that, he decided he was in love with me and wanted to keep me, as though the wanting could somehow undo the taking. His father came to my father to arrange a marriage, all smooth and polite, grown men bargaining over my body while I sat trapped in that man's house unable to go home. Everyone in this whole affair is talking about honor and alliances and the bride-price. Not one of them has asked me a single thing. I am the girl this was done to, and somehow I have become the smallest, quietest part of my own story.
posts.highlight: Shechem rapes Dinah, then seeks to marry her; the men negotiate over her (Gen 34:1-6)
posts.ember: the violation of Dinah; Scripture names the wrong done to a woman the world would rather bargain past

author_info.name: Dinah
author_info.bio: Daughter of Leah and Jacob. I went out to see the women of the land, and everything changed. 💔
